sections.paragraph:
Πατροβᾶς, ᾶ, ὁ (CIG 6864. Short form of Πατρόβιος. B-D-F §125; Rob. 173) Patrobas recipient of a greeting Ro 16:14.—BHHW III1402; Pauly-W. XVIII 2253; Kl. Pauly IV 555.

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 789
